title: Dreams
description: A mod that adds a bunch of quality of life features and new features to the game. This icon is not mine, I got it from Adobe stock
body:
## Quality of life
### Dragon breath dupe**
 Put dragon breath with a bottle to duplicate it
## **Totems**
### **Curification totem**
 Once you hold the curification totem you will be able to trade with a villager with all trades costing 1 emerald (Note: this is done with hero of the village effect)
